title: Supreme Court grants bail to Suhail Ahmad Thokar in terror conspiracy case
description: The Supreme Court on Friday granted bail to Suhail Ahmad Thokar in connection with case involving allegations of a larger conspiracy to facilitate terrorist activities in Jammu and Kashmir following the repeal of Article 370 of the Constitution.A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi granted bail subject to various conditions. The Court warned that the violation of any bail condition would result in the cancellation of Thokar's bail an
